SIGNED BLANKET APP & ORDER RE; DISPOSAL OF EXHIBITS FILED
NTC OF APPEAL,REQ FOR COURT-APP ATTY,NTC REGARDING RECORD ON APPEAL FILED

/CAL:SENTENCE/TWS/X:AS TO COUNT 1-/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 20D/CTS: 1/SWAPD:01-19-17/PF390 12/VF2:150/FOP1: 3 MONTH/LVAL/LCHEM/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/1463ALC/X:AS TO COUNT 2-/CH2:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 20D/CTS: 1/654:2/CTORD:COLLECTION OF FINES AND FEES AS TO COUNT 2 ARE SUSPENDED,/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/4019HALF/COLLECT/OBEY/APPEAL/

/CAL:JURY TRIAL - PEOPLE'S REBUTTAL CASE/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE PROSECUTION CASE/X:REBUTTAL WITNESS ON BEHALF OF THE PEOPLE, ACTING FORENSIC SUPERVISOR ERIC INGLE, IS RECALLED TO THE STAND AND RE-EXAMINED,/X:BOTH COUNSEL REST THEIR RESPECTIVE CASES,/X:COURT & BOTH COUNSEL DISCUSS JURY INSTRUCTION ISSUES,/CTORD: THAT THE DEFENSE ORAL MOTION FOR JUDGMENT OF ACQUITTAL OF  COUNTS 1, 2, 3 & 4, PURSUANT TO PC 1118,1 IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, AS STATED ONTHE RECORD/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE JURY INSTRUCTIONS/X:COURT PRESENTS THE MAIN JURY INSTRUCTIONS,/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE CLOSING ARGUMENTS/X:BOTH COUNSEL PRESENT THEIR RESPECTIVE CLOSING ARGUMENTS,/TEXT:TRIAL PHASE VERDICT/X: JURY RETURNS VERDICTS AS FOLLOWS:/X: COUNT ONE: GUILTY VERDICT; NOT TRUE ON23577(A) ALLEGATION; TRUE ON 23578 ALLEGATION,/X: COUNT TWO: GUILTY VERDICT; NOT TRUE ON 23577(A) ALLEGATION; TRUE ON 23578 ALLEGATION,/CONTD:JURY TRIAL - INFRACTION COUNTS 3 & 4, POSSIBLE SENTENCING ON COUNTS 1 & 2 ON 01-19-17 AT 11:00 AM/DOP/
